scores.correctness_notes: The response is largely correct but has two notable gaps vs. the gold standard: (1) the priority order omits ErrorStatus at the top — the agent lists Blocked as highest priority, but the gold standard specifies error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active; (2) the agent never mentions that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error, which is an important constraint. Everything else (collect_unit_status, collect_app_status, leader-only behaviour, component-based pattern) is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all APIs, events, and patterns used exist and are real
